message:
fix(test): parking_lot Mutex::lock() returns guard directly, not Result

- asupersync_spike.rs: add missing `mut` on channel receiver binding
- proptest_dpor_schedule.rs: remove 19 `.expect("lock scheduler")`
  calls — parking_lot::Mutex::lock() doesn't return Result, it returns
  the guard directly (unlike std::sync::Mutex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
